results.name: brushwagg
results.description: A unique-to-Magic species that is a creature covered with prickly brush, similar to a porcupine.

results.name: bucky barnes
results.description: James Buchanan "Bucky" Barnes, also known as the Winter Soldier.

results.name: buff mana
results.description: Mana that comes with additional benefits when spent.

results.name: bulette
results.description: A burrowing ambush predator common in some regions of the Forgotten Realms. Also known as a land shark.

results.name: bunsen burner
results.description: The little burner you put under vials to heat them up.

results.name: burn
results.description: Effects that deal damage, whether to creatures, players, or planeswalkers.

results.name: burn any
results.description: Cards that burn any target: players, creatures, battles, or planeswalkers.

results.name: burn bright with set mechanic
results.description: Cards like [Burn Bright](https://scryfall.com/card/rna/93/burn-bright) or [Trumpet Blast](https://scryfall.com/card/m10/160/trumpet-blast), but with the set's mechanic.

results.name: burnished banner
results.description: The force led by Mishra in the Brothers' War. Mishra's machines tend to feature sharp, sleek designs with pointy blades, and his soldiers are mostly Fallaji with a green and rust-red color scheme.

results.name: burn-self
results.description: Creatures deal damage to themselves.

results.name: burn with set's mechanic
results.description: Burn spells that have the mechanic of the set they debuted in.

results.name: burrog
results.description: A species of frogfolk native to Arcavios.

results.name: burst draw
results.description: Card draw effects that can net you a bunch of cards at once. As a rule of thumb, to qualify for this tag, the card should let you draw at least three cards at a time and come out ahead by at least +1.

results.name: bushido
results.description: Whenever X blocks or becomes blocked, it's power and toughness is modified until end of turn.

results.name: butch
results.description: Women and fem characters presenting a butch aesthetic (or butch-ish)

results.name: buttcrew
results.description: Cards that crew with toughness rather than power.

results.name: buttfling
results.description: Fling, but using toughness for damage.

results.name: buttress
results.description: A diagonal support structure for a building.

results.name: buttsaddle
results.description: Cards that saddle with toughness rather than power.

results.name: buttstation
results.description: Cards that station using their toughness rather than their power.

results.name: buttstrike
results.description: Creatures assign damage equal to their toughness.

results.name: cabal arena
results.description: The Cabal did love their pit fights.
